title: Patternmakers, Metal and Plastic
description: Lay out, machine, fit, and assemble castings and parts to metal or plastic foundry patterns, core boxes, or match plates.

tasks.text: Verify conformance of patterns or template dimensions to specifications, using measuring instruments such as calipers, scales, and micrometers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up and operate machine tools, such as milling machines, lathes, drill presses, and grinders, to machine castings or patterns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair and rework templates and patterns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble pattern sections, using hand tools, bolts, screws, rivets, glue, or welding equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read and interpret blueprints or drawings of parts to be cast or patterns to be made, compute dimensions, and plan operational sequences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Construct platforms, fixtures, and jigs for holding and placing patterns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and finish patterns or templates, using emery cloths, files, scrapers, and power grinders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mark identification numbers or symbols onto patterns or templates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Program computerized numerical control machine tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create computer models of patterns or parts, using modeling software.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design and create templates, patterns, or coreboxes according to work orders, sample parts, or mockups.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Lay out and draw or scribe patterns onto material, using compasses, protractors, rulers, scribes, or other instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select pattern materials such as wood, resin, and fiberglass.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply plastic-impregnated fabrics or coats of sealing wax or lacquer to patterns used to produce plastic.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
